detail: Retry: Honor Retry-After header on 429 responses
Retry: POST endpoint list is stale and incomplete
Retry: 1xx status codes incorrectly marked as retryable
Error: API error code dropped in CogniteError
Error: CogniteMultiError unsafe cast on first error
Error: forbidden field from API errors not preserved
Error: Typo 'succeded' in public API (MultiError, utils)
Dedup: No request-level deduplication in HTTP client
Batching: No concurrency limit for parallel chunked requests
Batching: Sequential create applied to all resource types
Batching: Pretty-printed JSON in all request bodies
Retry: Path matching uses loose substring — could match wrong endpoints
Retry: Client hardcodes max retries, ignoring validator config
Batching: Sequential chunked ops fail-fast skips remaining chunks
Error: isAutoRetryable field from API response silently dropped
